title: APM: OWASP Attack Volume by Service
description: Sunburst nesting Service Name inside Attack Type. Operators can compare which application surfaces face which OWASP categories most frequently and drill outward from a tactic slice to the affected service.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Attack Type' != null | stats count as Events by 'Attack Type', 'Service Name' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Which OWASP category dominates browser attacks right now?
Compare attack mix between enterprise-crm-portal and octo-drone-shop.
